query: Italian diesel price self-service May 2026 MIMIT DGSAIE weekly average gasolio
answer:
I have the best available data from my first agent which successfully retrieved current regional prices from the MIMIT website. Let me compile the full research report.

---

## Italian Diesel (Gasolio) Self-Service Price — May 2026: Research Findings

### Key Source & Data Vintage
The primary data comes from **MIMIT (Ministero delle Imprese e del Made in Italy)** — the official Italian government source for fuel prices. The data was retrieved from `https://www.mimit.gov.it/it/prezzo-medio-carburanti/regioni` and is dated **05 May 2026** (today).

### National Average (Computed from Regional Data)
The **DGSAIE weekly national average** page (`media-nazionale`) loads data dynamically via JavaScript and was not directly scrapeable. However, the regional breakdown was obtained, and a simple arithmetic mean across all 21 regions/provinces yields:

- **Estimated national average gasolio self-service: ~2.047 EUR/liter** (as of 05-05-2026)

### Regional Breakdown (EUR/liter, Self-Service, 05-05-2026)

| Region | Gasolio Self (€/L) |
|---|---|
| Campania (lowest) | **2.032** |
| Marche | 2.035 |
| Umbria | 2.035 |
| Lazio | 2.038 |
| Sardegna | 2.038 |
| Lombardia | 2.041 |
| Toscana | 2.041 |
| Emilia Romagna | 2.044 |
| Piemonte | 2.045 |
| Veneto | 2.045 |
| Abruzzo | 2.047 |
| Liguria | 2.050 |
| Sicilia | 2.050 |
| Provincia di Trento | 2.051 |
| Friuli Venezia Giulia | 2.055 |
| Puglia | 2.055 |
| Molise | 2.057 |
| Valle d'Aosta | 2.057 |
| Calabria | 2.060 |
| Basilicata | 2.061 |
| Provincia di Bolzano (highest) | **2.063** |

### Key Observations
- The price range is narrow: **2.032–2.063 EUR/L** (spread of just 0.031 EUR/L across all regions).
- Southern regions tend to be slightly cheaper (Campania at 2.032) while autonomous provinces in the north (Bolzano at 2.063) are the most expensive.
- For context, benzina (gasoline) self-service is approximately 1.921 EUR/L (Abruzzo sample), meaning diesel is currently **~0.13 EUR/L more expensive** than gasoline.

### Data Accessibility Note
The DGSAIE weekly data endpoint has migrated from `dgsaie.mise.gov.it` to `sisen.mase.gov.it/dgsaie/` (under the Ministry of Environment and Energy Security) and now requires authentication for API/CSV access. The MIMIT regional prices page remains the best publicly accessible source.

key_facts: Italian diesel (gasolio) self-service price as of 05-05-2026 ranges from 2.032 to 2.063 EUR/liter across regions, per MIMIT data.
Estimated national average gasolio self-service price: approximately 2.047 EUR/liter (arithmetic mean of 21 regional averages).
Lowest regional price: Campania at 2.032 EUR/liter; highest: Provincia di Bolzano at 2.063 EUR/liter.
Price spread across all Italian regions is narrow at just 0.031 EUR/liter.
Diesel (gasolio) is approximately 0.13 EUR/liter more expensive than gasoline (benzina) self-service (~1.921 EUR/L).
The DGSAIE weekly data endpoint has migrated from dgsaie.mise.gov.it to sisen.mase.gov.it/dgsaie/ and now requires authentication for API/CSV exports.
The MIMIT regional prices page (mimit.gov.it/it/prezzo-medio-carburanti/regioni) remains the best publicly accessible official source for current fuel prices.
